session.os_version: Darwin Kernel Version 25.4.0: Thu Mar 19 19:30:44 PDT 2026; root:xnu-12377.101.15~1/RELEASE_ARM64_T6000
session.model_label: OLMo 2 (7B) — Allen AI, open science, transparent training

log.prompt: Describe the feeling of standing at the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night, in two or three sentences.
log.response: Standing at the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night evokes a profound sense of awe and mystery. The darkness mirrors the depths of the unknown sea, while the gentle ebb and flow of the waves create a soothing yet haunting melody under the moonlight.
